popularStory.headline: William Carpenter of Rehoboth
popularStory.description: William Carpenter married Abigail Briant. William was born ca 1605 in Wiltshire, England and died 7 February 1658/9 in Rehoboth, Massachusetts. His estate inventory was 21 February 1658/9? and the wil …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Briant於1604年5月27日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾沙爾布恩時，她的父親John Briant33歲，母親Alice33歲。她於1625年4月28日與William Carpenter在英國維爾爾沙爾布恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1687年2月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年82歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯紐曼 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Briant于1604年5月27日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾沙爾布恩时，她的父亲John Briant33岁，母亲Alice33岁。她于1625年4月28日与William Carpenter在英国維爾爾沙爾布恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1687年2月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年82岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯紐曼 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Briant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Laure.

variants.name: Bryant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Celtic personal name Brian (from brigo- ‘high’ + the suffix -ant-), with excrescent -t. Breton bearers of this name were among the Normans who invaded England in 1066. They went on to settle in Ireland in the 12th century, where the name mingled with the native Irish form Briain (see O'Brien ). The latter had also been borrowed, as Brján, by the Vikings, who introduced it independently into northwestern England before the Norman Conquest.
Breton: very rare variant of   Briant   (see   Briand  ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The American poet William Cullen Bryant (1794–1878) came of a New England family, being descended from Stephen Bryant, who had settled in Plymouth Colony in 1632.

variants.name: Briand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Jacques, Alban, Alphonse, Andre, Benoit, Florent, Francois, Olivier.

Breton (rarely Le Briand): from Old Breton brient ‘privilege, prerogative’ (a derivative of bri ‘dignity, consideration’), used as a medieval personal name and as a nickname (possibly for a pretentious individual). Compare Briant , Brien , Brillant , and Pontbriand .

History: Pierre-François Briand/Brillant from Saint-Malo in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany (France), married Renée Marchand in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1730. Thomas Briand/Briant from Pleudihen-sur-Rance in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany (France), married Marie-Josèphe Lefebvre in Quebec City, QC, in 1754.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Briant was born on 27 May 1604, in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Briant, was 33 and her mother, Alice, was 33. She married William Carpenter on 28 April 1625, in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 February 1687, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82, and was buried in Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Briant est née le 27 mai 1604, à Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Briant, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Carpenter le 28 avril 1625, à Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 février 1687, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Briant am 27. Mai 1604 in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Briant 33 und ihre Mutter Alice 33. Sie hat am 28. April 1625 in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England William Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Februar 1687 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Briant è nata il il 27 maggio 1604 nel Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Briant, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Alice, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Carpenter il 28 aprile 1625, nel Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1687, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Briantが1604年5月27日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアシャルボウルンで生まれた時，父John Briantは33歳，母Aliceは33歳であった。1625年4月28日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアシャルボウルンでWilliam Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1687年2月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスで82歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスプロヴィデンスニューマン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Briant(이)가 1604년 5월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 샤보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Briant(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1625년 4월 28일 영국 윌츠히르 샤보우른에서 William Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1687년 2월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스 뉴먼 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Briant nasceu em 27 de maio de 1604, em Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Briant, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Carpenter em 28 de abril de 1625, em Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1687, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Briant родилась 27 мая 1604 г. в местности шэлбурн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Briant было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Carpenter 28 апреля 1625 г. в местности шэлбурн, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 февраля 1687 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности нюман кеметири, провиденс, провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Briant nació el 27 de mayo de 1604, en Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Briant, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Carpenter el 28 de abril de 1625, en Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1687, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
